name: Moti Daman Fort
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A massive 16th-century coastal fortress enclosing a small township of Portuguese colonial buildings, historic churches, and quiet tree-lined streets.
history: Construction began in 1559 by the Portuguese after acquiring Daman from the Shah of Gujarat to protect against Mughal invasions.
famousFor: Colonial architecture, massive ramparts, and historic churches.
